title: Descriptor Position Triplet (0x43)
description: Descriptor Position triplet. Triplet length is 3 bytes (including length and TID). Offsets 0 and 1 (length and TID) are standard and omitted here; payload starts at offset 2.

elements.name: DesPosID
elements.description: Descriptor Position identifier. Valid values X'01'..X'7F' representing the associated Object Area Position structured field identifier.

notes: TID should be X'43' for this triplet. The triplet length is fixed at 3 in most usages.
